Smoke and Sanity Testing in production
description:
Checking critical functionalities in production after deployment.
Post Release Validation

This release introduces four new frameworks — BCMS, TISAX, DPDPA, and NESA — which are now live in the production environment. In addition, several bugs across multiple modules have been identified and resolved to enhance overall system stability and functionality.
Tickets Addressed in This Release:
WIZ-817
WIZ-782
WIZ-783
WIZ-806
WIZ-821
WIZ-787
Key Updates and Fixes:
TPRM: Previously, questionnaire completion validation was enforced only on the frontend. This validation has now been implemented at the backend to ensure all questions are answered.
People Module: File upload restrictions for non-admin users have been resolved.
Training Module: Trainings are now restricted for employees with an Inactive status.
People Page: File upload–related issues have been fixed, including date format corrections and the addition of an instruction sheet.
Postal Code: The issue preventing clients from adding international postal pincodes has been resolved.
Default Files: Templates and trackers have been moved to the Default Files section, allowing users to edit the files and link them to the respective artifacts.
